CustomField.description: True when this EA or EIS is explicitly tiered from a prior programmatic EIS under 40 CFR 1502.20. Triggers VR-006: if the prior EIS is older than 5 years (nepa_prior_nepa_date__c), requires a supplementation review determination before proceeding.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This process tiers from a prior programmatic EIS. A supplementation review is required if the prior EIS is more than 5 years old.
CustomField.label: Tiering to Prior EIS
